731	class BatchPODWithPagedKVCacheWrapper:
732	    r"""Wrapper class for POD-Attention with paged kv-cache (first proposed in
733	    `<https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.18038>`_) for batch of requests.
734	
735	    Check :ref:`our tutorial<kv-layout>` for page table layout.
736	
737	    Examples
738	    --------
739	    >>> import torch
740	    >>> import flashinfer
741	    >>> num_layers = 8
742	    >>> num_qo_heads = 64
743	    >>> num_kv_heads = 8
744	    >>> head_dim = 128
745	    >>> max_num_pages = 128
746	    >>> device = 0
747	    >>> page_block_size = 1
748	    >>> causal = True
749	    >>> # allocate 128MB workspace buffer
750	    >>> workspace_buffer = torch.empty(128 * 1024 * 1024, dtype=torch.uint8, device="cuda:0")
751	    >>> wrapper = flashinfer.BatchPODWithPagedKVCacheWrapper(
752	    ...     workspace_buffer, "NHD"
753	    ... )
754	    >>> # Prefill and decode parameters
755	    >>> p_qo_lens = [2048] * 2
756	    >>> d_qo_lens = [1] * 128
757	    >>> p_kv_lens = [2048] * 2
758	    >>> d_kv_lens = [2048] * 128
759	    >>> # Prefill plan inputs
760	    >>> p_seq_lens_blocks = torch.ceil(
761	    ...     torch.tensor(p_kv_lens, dtype=torch.int32) / page_block_size
762	    ... ).int()
763	    >>> p_q_indptr = torch.cat(
764	    ...     [torch.tensor([0]), torch.cumsum(torch.tensor(p_qo_lens), 0)], dim=0
765	    ... ).int()
766	    >>> p_kv_indptr = torch.cat(
767	    ...     [torch.tensor([0]), torch.cumsum(p_seq_lens_blocks, 0)], dim=0
768	    ... ).int()
769	    >>> kv_indices_p = torch.arange(0, p_kv_indptr[-1], device=device, dtype=torch.int32)
770	    >>> last_page_len_p = (p_seq_lens_blocks - 1) % page_block_size + 1
771	    >>> # Decode plan inputs
772	    >>> d_seq_lens_blocks = torch.ceil(
773	    ...     torch.tensor(d_kv_lens, dtype=torch.int32) / page_block_size
774	    ... ).int()
775	    >>> d_q_indptr = torch.cat(
776	    ...     [torch.tensor([0]), torch.cumsum(torch.tensor(d_qo_lens), 0)], dim=0
777	    ... ).int()
778	    >>> d_kv_indptr = torch.cat(
779	    ...     [torch.tensor([0]), torch.cumsum(d_seq_lens_blocks, 0)], dim=0
780	    ... ).int()
781	    >>> kv_indices_d = torch.arange(0, d_kv_indptr[-1], device=device, dtype=torch.int32)
782	    >>> last_page_len_d = (d_seq_lens_blocks - 1) % page_block_size + 1
783	    >>> # create auxiliary data structures for batch decode attention
784	    >>> wrapper.plan(
785	    ...     # Prefill params
786	    ...     p_q_indptr.to(device),
787	    ...     p_kv_indptr.to(device),
788	    ...     kv_indices_p.to(device),
789	    ...     last_page_len_p,
790	    ...     # Decode params
791	    ...     d_q_indptr.to(device),
792	    ...     d_kv_indptr.to(device),
793	    ...     kv_indices_d.to(device),
794	    ...     last_page_len_d,
795	    ...     # Common params
796	    ...     num_qo_heads=num_qo_heads,
797	    ...     num_kv_heads=num_kv_heads,
798	    ...     head_dim=head_dim,
799	    ...     page_size=page_block_size,
800	    ...     q_data_type=torch.bfloat16,
801	    ...     kv_data_type=torch.bfloat16,
802	    ... )
803	    >>> # Prefill input tensors
804	    >>> q_p = torch.rand(p_q_indptr[-1].item(), num_qo_heads, head_dim).to(
805	    ...     device, dtype=torch.bfloat16
806	    ... )
807	    >>> kv_p = torch.randn(p_kv_indptr[-1], 2, page_block_size, num_kv_heads, head_dim).to(
808	    ...     device, dtype=torch.bfloat16
809	    ... ).unbind(1)
810	    >>> # Decode input tensors
811	    >>> q_d = torch.rand(d_q_indptr[-1].item(), num_qo_heads, head_dim).to(
812	    ...     device, dtype=torch.bfloat16
813	    ... )
814	    >>> kv_d = torch.randn(d_kv_indptr[-1], 2, page_block_size, num_kv_heads, head_dim).to(
815	    ...     device, dtype=torch.bfloat16
816	    ... ).unbind(1)
817	    >>> for i in range(num_layers):
818	    ...     o_p_batch, o_d_batch = wrapper.run(
819	    ...         q_p,
820	    ...         kv_p,
821	    ...         q_d,
822	    ...         kv_d,
823	    ...         causal_p=causal,
824	    ...     )
825	    >>> print(o_p_batch.shape, o_d_batch.shape)
826	    torch.Size([4096, 64, 128]) torch.Size([128, 64, 128])
827	
828	    Note
829	    ----
830	    To accelerate computation, FlashInfer's POD-Attention creates some
831	    auxiliary data structures, these data structures can be reused across multiple
832	    batch decode attention calls (e.g. different Transformer layers). This wrapper class
833	    manages the lifecycle of these data structures.
834	    """
835	
836	    @flashinfer_api
837	    def __init__(
838	        self,
839	        float_workspace_buffer: torch.Tensor,
840	        kv_layout: str = "NHD",
841	    ) -> None:
842	        r"""Constructor of :class:`BatchPODWithPagedKVCacheWrapper`.
843	
844	        Parameters
845	        ----------
846	        float_workspace_buffer : torch.Tensor
847	            The user reserved float workspace buffer used to store intermediate attention results
848	            in the split-k algorithm. The recommended size is 128MB, the device of the workspace
849	            buffer should be the same as the device of the input tensors.
850	
851	        kv_layout : str
852	            The layout of the input k/v tensors, could be either ``NHD`` or ``HND``.
853	
854	        """
855	        _check_kv_layout(kv_layout)
856	        # Override options. Only tensor core version is performant.
857	        use_tensor_cores = True
858	        self._jit_module: SimpleNamespace = None
859	
860	        self._kv_layout = kv_layout
861	        float_workspace_buffer_p, float_workspace_buffer_d = torch.chunk(
862	            float_workspace_buffer, 2, dim=0
863	        )
864	        self._float_workspace_buffer_p = float_workspace_buffer_p
865	        self._float_workspace_buffer_d = float_workspace_buffer_d
866	        self.device = float_workspace_buffer_p.device
867	        self._int_workspace_buffer_p = torch.empty(
868	            (8 * 1024 * 1024,), dtype=torch.uint8, device=self.device
869	        )
870	        self._int_workspace_buffer_d = torch.empty(
871	            (8 * 1024 * 1024,), dtype=torch.uint8, device=self.device
872	        )
873	        self._pin_memory_int_workspace_buffer_p = torch.empty(
874	            (8 * 1024 * 1024,),
875	            dtype=torch.uint8,
876	            pin_memory=True,
877	            device="cpu",
878	        )
879	        self._pin_memory_int_workspace_buffer_d = torch.empty(
880	            (8 * 1024 * 1024,),
881	            dtype=torch.uint8,
882	            pin_memory=True,
883	            device="cpu",
884	        )
885	
886	        # SM aware scheduling buffer, requires SMs count + 2 entries
887	        dev_prop = torch.cuda.get_device_properties(self.device)
888	        self._sm_aware_sched = torch.empty(
889	            (dev_prop.multi_processor_count + 2), dtype=torch.int, device=self.device
890	        )
891	
892	        self._fixed_batch_size = 0
893	
894	        self._paged_kv_indptr_buf = None
895	        self._paged_kv_indices_buf = None
896	        self._paged_kv_last_page_len_buf = None
897	        self._use_tensor_cores = use_tensor_cores
898	        self._use_cuda_graph = False
899	
900	    @property
901	    def is_cuda_graph_enabled(self) -> bool:
902	        return self._use_cuda_graph
903	
904	    @flashinfer_api
905	    def plan(
906	        self,
907	        qo_indptr_p: torch.Tensor,
908	        kv_indptr_p: torch.Tensor,

910	        last_page_len_p: torch.Tensor,
911	        qo_indptr_d: torch.Tensor,
912	        kv_indptr_d: torch.Tensor,
913	        kv_indices_d: torch.Tensor,

929	        r"""Plan POD's batch prefill and decode for given problem specification.
930	
931	        Parameters
932	        ----------
933	        qo_indptr_p : torch.Tensor
934	            The prefill indptr of the query/output tensor, shape: ``[batch_size + 1]``.
935	        kv_indptr_p : torch.Tensor

937	        kv_indices_p : torch.Tensor

944	        kv_indptr_d : torch.Tensor

946	        kv_indices_d : torch.Tensor

948	        last_page_len_d : torch.Tensor
949	            The number of entries in the last page of each decode request in the paged
950	            kv-cache, shape: ``[batch_size]``.

953	        num_kv_heads : int
954	            The number of key/value heads
955	        head_dim : int
956	            The dimension of the heads
957	        page_size : int
958	            The page size of the paged kv cache
959	        pos_encoding_mode : str
960	            The position encoding applied inside attention kernels, could be
961	            ``NONE``/``ROPE_LLAMA`` (LLAMA style rotary embedding) /``ALIBI``.
962	            Defaults to ``NONE``.
963	        window_left : int
964	            The left (inclusive) window size for the attention window, when set to ``-1``, the window
965	            size will be set to the full length of the sequence. Defaults to ``-1``.
966	        q_data_type : Optional[Union[str, torch.dtype]]
967	            The data type of the query tensor, defaults torch.float16.
968	        kv_data_type : Optional[Union[str, torch.dtype]]
969	            The data type of the key/value tensor. If None, will be set to
970	            ``q_data_type``. Defaults to ``None``.
971	        data_type: Optional[Union[str, torch.dtype]]
972	            The data type of both the query and key/value tensors. Defaults to torch.float16.
973	            data_type is deprecated, please use q_data_type and kv_data_type instead.
974	        sm_scale : Optional[float]
975	            The scale used in softmax, if not provided, will be set to
976	            ``1.0 / sqrt(head_dim_qk)``.
977	        rope_scale : Optional[float]
978	            The scale used in RoPE interpolation, if not provided, will be set to
979	            ``1.0``.
980	        rope_theta : Optional[float]
981	            The theta used in RoPE, if not provided, will be set to ``1e4``.
982	        non_blocking : bool
983	            Whether to copy the input tensors to the device asynchronously, defaults to ``True``.
984	
985	        Note
986	        ----
987	        The :meth:`plan` method should be called before any :meth:`run` or
988	        :meth:`run_return_lse` calls, auxiliary data structures will be created
989	        during this call and cached for multiple run calls.
990	
991	        The ``num_qo_heads`` must be a multiple of ``num_kv_heads``. If ``num_qo_heads``
992	        is not equal to ``num_kv_heads``, the function will use
993	        `grouped query attention <https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.13245>`_.
994	
995	        The :meth:`plan` method cannot be used in Cuda Graph or in ``torch.compile``.
996	        """
997	        # Logits soft cap is not supported currently
998	        logits_soft_cap = 0.0
999	
1000	        # Setup prefill params
1001	        batch_size_p = len(last_page_len_p)
1002	        qo_indptr_host_p = qo_indptr_p.to("cpu")
1003	        total_num_rows_p = int(qo_indptr_host_p[-1])
1004	        self._kv_indptr_buf_p = kv_indptr_p.to(self.device, non_blocking=non_blocking)
1005	        self._kv_indices_buf_p = kv_indices_p.to(self.device, non_blocking=non_blocking)
1006	        self._kv_last_page_len_buf_p = last_page_len_p.to(
1007	            self.device, non_blocking=non_blocking
1008	        )
1009	        self._qo_indptr_buf_p = qo_indptr_host_p.to(
1010	            self.device, non_blocking=non_blocking
1011	        )
1012	        kv_indptr_host_p = kv_indptr_p.to("cpu")
1013	        last_page_len_host_p = last_page_len_p.to("cpu")
1014	        kv_lens_arr_host_p = get_seq_lens(
1015	            kv_indptr_host_p, last_page_len_host_p, page_size
1016	        )
1017	
1018	        if data_type is not None:
1019	            if q_data_type is None:
1020	                q_data_type = data_type
1021	            if kv_data_type is None:
1022	                kv_data_type = data_type
1023	
1024	        q_data_type = canonicalize_torch_dtype(q_data_type)
1025	        if kv_data_type is None:
1026	            kv_data_type = q_data_type
1027	        kv_data_type = canonicalize_torch_dtype(kv_data_type)
1028	
1029	        self._cached_q_data_type = q_data_type
1030	        self._cached_kv_data_type = kv_data_type
1031	        if self._jit_module is not None:
1032	            self._cached_module = self._jit_module
1033	        else:
1034	            self._cached_module = get_batch_prefill_module(
1035	                "fa2",
1036	                q_data_type,
1037	                kv_data_type,
1038	                q_data_type,
1039	                kv_indptr_p.dtype,
1040	                head_dim,  # head_dim_qk
1041	                head_dim,  # head_dim_vo
1042	                PosEncodingMode[pos_encoding_mode].value,
1043	                window_left != -1,  # use_sliding_window
1044	                logits_soft_cap > 0,  # use_logits_soft_cap
1045	                False,  # use_fp16_qk_reduction
1046	            )
1047	
1048	        # Setup decode params
1049	        batch_size_d = len(last_page_len_d)
1050	        qo_indptr_host_d = qo_indptr_d.to("cpu")
1051	        total_num_rows_d = int(qo_indptr_host_d[-1])
1052	        self._kv_indptr_buf_d = kv_indptr_d.to(self.device, non_blocking=non_blocking)
1053	        self._kv_indices_buf_d = kv_indices_d.to(self.device, non_blocking=non_blocking)
1054	        self._kv_last_page_len_buf_d = last_page_len_d.to(
1055	            self.device, non_blocking=non_blocking
1056	        )
1057	        self._qo_indptr_buf_d = qo_indptr_host_d.to(
1058	            self.device, non_blocking=non_blocking
1059	        )
1060	        kv_indptr_host_d = kv_indptr_d.to("cpu")
1061	        last_page_len_host_d = last_page_len_d.to("cpu")
1062	        kv_lens_arr_host_d = get_seq_lens(
1063	            kv_indptr_host_d, last_page_len_host_d, page_size
1064	        )
1065	
1066	        self._plan_info_d = self._cached_module.plan(
1067	            self._float_workspace_buffer_d,
1068	            self._int_workspace_buffer_d,
1069	            self._pin_memory_int_workspace_buffer_d,
1070	            qo_indptr_host_d,
1071	            kv_indptr_host_d,
1072	            kv_lens_arr_host_d,
1073	            total_num_rows_d,  # total_num_rows
1074	            batch_size_d,
1075	            num_qo_heads,
1076	            num_kv_heads,
1077	            page_size,
1078	            self.is_cuda_graph_enabled,
1079	            head_dim,
1080	            head_dim,
1081	            False,  # causal
1082	            window_left,
1083	            -1,  # fixed_split_size
1084	            False,  # disable_split_kv
1085	            0,  # num_colocated_ctas
1086	        )
1087	
1088	        num_colocated_ctas = self._plan_info_d[0]
1089	        # Splitting small prefill causes unecessary bandwidth contention
1090	        if total_num_rows_p > 1536:
1091	            num_colocated_ctas = 0
1092	        self._plan_info_p = self._cached_module.plan(
1093	            self._float_workspace_buffer_p,
1094	            self._int_workspace_buffer_p,
1095	            self._pin_memory_int_workspace_buffer_p,
1096	            qo_indptr_host_p,
1097	            kv_indptr_host_p,
1098	            kv_lens_arr_host_p,
1099	            total_num_rows_p,  # total_num_rows
1100	            batch_size_p,
1101	            num_qo_heads,
1102	            num_kv_heads,
1103	            page_size,
1104	            self.is_cuda_graph_enabled,
1105	            head_dim,
1106	            head_dim,
1107	            False,  # causal
1108	            window_left,
1109	            -1,  # fixed_split_size
1110	            False,  # disable_split_kv
1111	            num_colocated_ctas,
1112	        )
1113	        self._indptr_type = kv_indptr_p.dtype
1114	        self._pos_encoding_mode = pos_encoding_mode
1115	        self._window_left = window_left
1116	        self._logits_soft_cap = logits_soft_cap
1117	        self._sm_scale = sm_scale
1118	        self._rope_scale = rope_scale
1119	        self._rope_theta = rope_theta
1120	
1121	    begin_forward = plan
1122	
1123	    @flashinfer_api(trace=batch_pod_with_paged_kv_cache_run_trace)
1124	    def run(
1125	        self,
1126	        # Main params (prefill and decode)
1127	        q_p: torch.Tensor,
1128	        paged_kv_cache_p: Union[torch.Tensor, Tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor]],
1129	        q_d: torch.Tensor,
1130	        paged_kv_cache_d: Union[torch.Tensor, Tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor]],
1131	        # Prefill options
1132	        custom_mask_p: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,
1133	        packed_custom_mask_p: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,
1134	        causal_p: bool = False,
1135	        # Decode options
1136	        q_scale: Optional[float] = None,
1137	        k_scale: Optional[float] = None,
1138	        v_scale: Optional[float] = None,
1139	        # Common options
1140	        return_lse: bool = False,
1141	        use_fp16_qk_reduction: bool = False,
1142	        enable_pdl: Optional[bool] = None,
1143	    ) -> Union[
1144	        Tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor],
1145	        Tuple[Tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor], Tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor]],
1146	    ]:
1147	        r"""Compute batched POD (Prefill-On-Decode) fused attention.
1148	
1149	        Fused single-shot attention that runs batched paged prefill (``q_p`` against
1150	        ``paged_kv_cache_p``) and batched paged decode (``q_d`` against
1151	        ``paged_kv_cache_d``) in the same kernel launch, sharing scheduling and
1152	        execution resources.  All prefill / decode shape and policy parameters
1153	        (pos-encoding, sliding window, sm_scale, RoPE, etc.) are taken from the
1154	        cached values supplied to :meth:`plan`.
1155	
1156	        Parameters
1157	        ----------
1158	        q_p : torch.Tensor
1159	            Prefill query tensor, shape ``[qo_indptr_p[-1], num_qo_heads, head_dim]``.
1160	        paged_kv_cache_p : Union[torch.Tensor, Tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor]]
1161	            Paged KV cache for the prefill requests.  Layout matches
1162	            ``kv_layout`` set in :meth:`__init__`.
1163	        q_d : torch.Tensor
1164	            Decode query tensor, shape ``[batch_size_d, num_qo_heads, head_dim]``.
1165	        paged_kv_cache_d : Union[torch.Tensor, Tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor]]
1166	            Paged KV cache for the decode requests.  Layout matches
1167	            ``kv_layout`` set in :meth:`__init__`.
1168	        custom_mask_p : Optional[torch.Tensor]
1169	            Optional dense custom mask for the prefill side (auto-packed when
1170	            ``packed_custom_mask_p`` is ``None``).
1171	        packed_custom_mask_p : Optional[torch.Tensor]
1172	            Optional bit-packed custom mask for the prefill side.
1173	        causal_p : bool
1174	            Whether to apply a causal mask to the prefill side.  Defaults to
1175	            ``False``.
1176	        q_scale, k_scale, v_scale : Optional[float]
1177	            FP8 calibration scales applied to the decode side.  Folded into the
1178	            decode ``sm_scale`` (``q_scale``, ``k_scale``) or the kernel output
1179	            (``v_scale``).
1180	        return_lse : bool
1181	            Whether to return the LSE tensors for both prefill and decode.
1182	            Defaults to ``False``.
1183	        use_fp16_qk_reduction : bool
1184	            Whether to accumulate ``QK`` in FP16 (lower precision, higher
1185	            throughput).  Defaults to ``False``.
1186	        enable_pdl : Optional[bool]
1187	            Programmatic Dependent Launch toggle.  When ``None`` (default), the
1188	            wrapper auto-detects support from the query device.
1189	
1190	        Returns
1191	        -------
1192	        Union[Tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor], Tuple[Tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor], Tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor]]]
1193	            By default ``(out_p, out_d)``: the prefill output and the decode
1194	            output.  When ``return_lse`` is ``True`` the return becomes
1195	            ``((out_p, lse_p), (out_d, lse_d))``.
1196	        """
1197	        if enable_pdl is None:
1198	            enable_pdl = device_support_pdl(q_p.device)
1199	
1200	        # Currently unsupported
1201	        logits_soft_cap_p = None
1202	        logits_soft_cap_d = None
1203	        # Prefill setup
1204	        k_cache_p, v_cache_p = _unpack_paged_kv_cache(paged_kv_cache_p, self._kv_layout)
1205	        _check_cached_qkv_data_type(
1206	            q_p, k_cache_p, self._cached_q_data_type, self._cached_kv_data_type
1207	        )
1208	        # Get params from plan
1209	        pos_encoding_mode_p = self._pos_encoding_mode
1210	        window_left_p = self._window_left
1211	        logits_soft_cap_p = self._logits_soft_cap
1212	        sm_scale_p = self._sm_scale
1213	        rope_scale_p = self._rope_scale
1214	        rope_theta_p = self._rope_theta
1215	        _check_pos_encoding_mode(pos_encoding_mode_p)
1216	        if logits_soft_cap_p is None:
1217	            logits_soft_cap_p = 0.0
1218	        if sm_scale_p is None:
1219	            head_dim = q_p.shape[-1]
1220	            sm_scale_p = 1.0 / math.sqrt(head_dim)
1221	        if rope_scale_p is None:
1222	            rope_scale_p = 1.0
1223	        if rope_theta_p is None:
1224	            rope_theta_p = 1e4
1225	
1226	        if custom_mask_p is not None and packed_custom_mask_p is None:
1227	            # create packed custom mask from custom mask
1228	            packed_custom_mask_p = packbits(
1229	                custom_mask_p.contiguous().view(-1), bitorder="little"
1230	            )
1231	
1232	        if packed_custom_mask_p is not None:
1233	            mask_mode_p = MaskMode.CUSTOM.value
1234	        else:
1235	            if causal_p:
1236	                mask_mode_p = MaskMode.CAUSAL.value
1237	            else:
1238	                mask_mode_p = MaskMode.NON_CAUSAL.value
1239	
1240	        lse_p = None
1241	        if return_lse:
1242	            lse_p = torch.empty(
1243	                (q_p.size(0), q_p.size(1)), dtype=torch.float32, device=q_p.device
1244	            )
1245	        out_p = torch.empty_like(q_p)
1246	
1247	        # Decode setup
1248	        k_cache_d, v_cache_d = _unpack_paged_kv_cache(paged_kv_cache_d, self._kv_layout)
1249	        _check_cached_qkv_data_type(
1250	            q_d, k_cache_d, self._cached_q_data_type, self._cached_kv_data_type
1251	        )
1252	        # Get params from plan
1253	        pos_encoding_mode_d = self._pos_encoding_mode
1254	        window_left_d = self._window_left
1255	        logits_soft_cap_d = self._logits_soft_cap
1256	        sm_scale_d = self._sm_scale
1257	        rope_scale_d = self._rope_scale
1258	        rope_theta_d = self._rope_theta
1259	        _check_pos_encoding_mode(pos_encoding_mode_d)
1260	        if logits_soft_cap_d is None:
1261	            logits_soft_cap_d = 0.0
1262	        if sm_scale_d is None:
1263	            head_dim = q_d.shape[-1]
1264	            sm_scale_d = 1.0 / math.sqrt(head_dim)
1265	        if q_scale is not None:
1266	            sm_scale_d *= q_scale
1267	        if k_scale is not None:
1268	            sm_scale_d *= k_scale
1269	        if rope_scale_d is None:
1270	            rope_scale_d = 1.0
1271	        if rope_theta_d is None:
1272	            rope_theta_d = 1e4
1273	
1274	        lse_d = None
1275	        if return_lse:
1276	            lse_d = torch.empty(
1277	                (q_d.size(0), q_d.size(1)), dtype=torch.float32, device=q_d.device
1278	            )
1279	        out_d = torch.empty_like(q_d)
1280	
1281	        module_getter = get_batch_pod_module(
1282	            # Prefill params
1283	            q_p.dtype,
1284	            k_cache_p.dtype,
1285	            q_p.dtype,
1286	            q_p.shape[-1],
1287	            PosEncodingMode[pos_encoding_mode_p].value,
1288	            window_left_p >= 0,  # use_sliding_window
1289	            logits_soft_cap_p > 0,  # use_logits_soft_cap
1290	            use_fp16_qk_reduction,
1291	            # Decode params
1292	            self._indptr_type,
1293	            PosEncodingMode[pos_encoding_mode_d].value,
1294	            window_left_d != -1,  # use_sliding_window
1295	            logits_soft_cap_d > 0,  # use_logits_soft_cap
1296	        )
1297	        module_getter.run_tensor(
1298	            # Prefill params
1299	            self._float_workspace_buffer_p,
1300	            self._int_workspace_buffer_p,
1301	            self._plan_info_p,
1302	            q_p,
1303	            k_cache_p,
1304	            v_cache_p,
1305	            self._qo_indptr_buf_p,
1306	            self._kv_indptr_buf_p,
1307	            self._kv_indices_buf_p,
1308	            self._kv_last_page_len_buf_p,
1309	            out_p,
1310	            lse_p,
1311	            mask_mode_p,
1312	            TensorLayout[self._kv_layout].value,
1313	            window_left_p,
1314	            packed_custom_mask_p,  # packed_custom_mask
1315	            None,  # mask_indptr_buf
1316	            _get_cache_alibi_slopes_buf(q_p.shape[1], q_p.device),
1317	            logits_soft_cap_p,
1318	            sm_scale_p,
1319	            1.0 / rope_scale_p,
1320	            1.0 / rope_theta_p,
1321	            # Decode params
1322	            self._float_workspace_buffer_d,
1323	            self._int_workspace_buffer_d,
1324	            self._plan_info_d,
1325	            q_d,
1326	            k_cache_d,
1327	            v_cache_d,
1328	            self._qo_indptr_buf_d,
1329	            self._kv_indptr_buf_d,
1330	            self._kv_indices_buf_d,
1331	            self._kv_last_page_len_buf_d,
1332	            out_d,
1333	            lse_d,
1334	            MaskMode.NON_CAUSAL.value,
1335	            TensorLayout[self._kv_layout].value,
1336	            window_left_d,
1337	            None,  # packed_custom_mask
1338	            None,  # mask_indptr_buf
1339	            _get_cache_alibi_slopes_buf(q_d.shape[1], q_d.device),
1340	            logits_soft_cap_d,
1341	            sm_scale_d,
1342	            1.0 / rope_scale_d,
1343	            1.0 / rope_theta_d,
1344	            enable_pdl,
1345	            self._sm_aware_sched,
1346	        )
1347	
1348	        if v_scale is not None:
1349	            out_d *= v_scale
1350	
1351	        return ((out_p, out_d), (lse_p, lse_d)) if return_lse else (out_p, out_d)
1352	
1353	    def end_forward(self) -> None:
1354	        r"""Warning: this function is deprecated and has no effect."""
1355	        pass
1356
